query: Could you help design a travel itinerary for 2 people, starting in Minneapolis and visiting 2 cities in Tennessee, spanning from March 2nd to March 6th, 2022? Our budget is set at $2,000. We will not be considering flight as a mode of transportation and would like to have non-shared rooms for accommodation. Also, we'd prefer smoking-friendly accommodations, as we are smokers.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Minneapolis to Nashville, duration: 12 hours 45 mins, distance: 1,420 km, cost: 71
plan.accommodation: Clean and large bedroom in a private house, Nashville

plan.attraction: Country Music Hall of Fame and Museum; Johnny Cash Museum; Centennial Park;
plan.accommodation: Clean and large bedroom in a private house, Nashville

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Nashville to Knoxville, duration: 2 hours 42 mins, distance: 290 km, cost: 14
plan.accommodation: Cozy Private Room in Chinatown/ Lower East Side, Knoxville

plan.attraction: World's Fair Park; Sunsphere; Knoxville Museum of Art;
plan.accommodation: Cozy Private Room in Chinatown/ Lower East Side, Knoxville

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Knoxville to Minneapolis, duration: 13 hours 58 mins, distance: 1,529 km, cost: 76
